final:
module RefModule 
(
  input rst,
  input clk,

  output reg [9:0] count
);

    wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) 
	begin
      count <= 10'b0000000001;
    end 
	
	else 
	begin
      count <= {count[8:0], count[9]};
    end
  end

endmodule
